normal_cases.name: API and MCP task creation resolve Sisyphus feature templates successfully after the repair.

edge_cases.name: Task creation still works when repo root is explicit and the current working directory differs.
The runtime does not silently fall back to `taskflow` template paths when feature and issue templates are resolved.

exception_cases.name: If template data is truly missing, task creation surfaces an actionable Sisyphus-scoped error instead of a stale taskflow path.
